uthash.h(3) Library Functions Manual uthash.h(3)

NAME

uthash.h

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define HASH_FUNCTION(keyptr, keylen, hashv)
#define HASH_JEN_MIX(a, b, c)

Macro Definition Documentation

#define HASH_FUNCTION( keyptr, keylen, hashv)

Value:

do {                                                                                                                 \


  if (!(keyptr) || (keylen) == 0) {                                                                                  \


    (hashv) = 1; /* Non-zero constant for safety */                                                                  \


  } else {                                                                                                           \


    (hashv) = fnv1a_hash_bytes((keyptr), (keylen));                                                                  \


  }                                                                                                                  \
} while (0)




Definition at line 41 of file uthash.h.


41 #define HASH_FUNCTION(keyptr, keylen, hashv)                                                                           \
42   do {                                                                                                                 \
43     if (!(keyptr) || (keylen) == 0) {                                                                                  \
44       (hashv) = 1; /* Non-zero constant for safety */                                                                  \
45     } else {                                                                                                           \
46       (hashv) = fnv1a_hash_bytes((keyptr), (keylen));                                                                  \
47     }                                                                                                                  \
48   } while (0)










#define
  HASH_JEN_MIX( a, b, c)


Definition at line 59 of file uthash.h.


59 #define HASH_JEN_MIX(a, b, c)                                                                                          \
60   do {                                                                                                                 \
61     /* Use 64-bit arithmetic for shifts to avoid undefined behavior, then mask back to 32-bit */                       \
62     uint64_t _a = (uint64_t)(a), _b = (uint64_t)(b), _c = (uint64_t)(c);                                               \
63     _a -= _b;                                                                                                          \
64     _a -= _c;                                                                                                          \
65     _a ^= (_c >> 13);                                                                                                  \
66     a = (unsigned)(_a & 0xFFFFFFFFU);                                                                                  \
67                                                                                                                        \
68     _b -= _c;                                                                                                          \
69     _b -= (uint64_t)a;                                                                                                 \
70     _b ^= (((uint64_t)a << 8) & 0xFFFFFFFFU);                                                                          \
71     b = (unsigned)(_b & 0xFFFFFFFFU);                                                                                  \
72                                                                                                                        \
73     _c -= (uint64_t)a;                                                                                                 \
74     _c -= (uint64_t)b;                                                                                                 \
75     _c ^= ((uint64_t)b >> 13);                                                                                         \
76     c = (unsigned)(_c & 0xFFFFFFFFU);                                                                                  \
77                                                                                                                        \
78     _a = (uint64_t)a;                                                                                                  \
79     _a -= (uint64_t)b;                                                                                                 \
80     _a -= (uint64_t)c;                                                                                                 \
81     _a ^= ((uint64_t)c >> 12);                                                                                         \
82     a = (unsigned)(_a & 0xFFFFFFFFU);                                                                                  \
83                                                                                                                        \
84     _b = (uint64_t)b;                                                                                                  \
85     _b -= (uint64_t)c;                                                                                                 \
86     _b -= (uint64_t)a;                                                                                                 \
87     _b ^= (((uint64_t)a << 16) & 0xFFFFFFFFU);                                                                         \
88     b = (unsigned)(_b & 0xFFFFFFFFU);                                                                                  \
89                                                                                                                        \
90     _c = (uint64_t)c;                                                                                                  \
91     _c -= (uint64_t)a;                                                                                                 \
92     _c -= (uint64_t)b;                                                                                                 \
93     _c ^= ((uint64_t)b >> 5);                                                                                          \
94     c = (unsigned)(_c & 0xFFFFFFFFU);                                                                                  \
95                                                                                                                        \
96     _a = (uint64_t)a;                                                                                                  \
97     _a -= (uint64_t)b;                                                                                                 \
98     _a -= (uint64_t)c;                                                                                                 \
99     _a ^= ((uint64_t)c >> 3);                                                                                          \
100     a = (unsigned)(_a & 0xFFFFFFFFU);                                                                                  \
101                                                                                                                        \
102     _b = (uint64_t)b;                                                                                                  \
103     _b -= (uint64_t)c;                                                                                                 \
104     _b -= (uint64_t)a;                                                                                                 \
105     _b ^= (((uint64_t)a << 10) & 0xFFFFFFFFU);                                                                         \
106     b = (unsigned)(_b & 0xFFFFFFFFU);                                                                                  \
107                                                                                                                        \
108     _c = (uint64_t)c;                                                                                                  \
109     _c -= (uint64_t)a;                                                                                                 \
110     _c -= (uint64_t)b;                                                                                                 \
111     _c ^= ((uint64_t)b >> 15);                                                                                         \
112     c = (unsigned)(_c & 0xFFFFFFFFU);                                                                                  \
113   } while (0)
